nasb.text: The sluggard does not plow after the autumn, So he begs during the harvest and has nothing.

esv.text: The sluggard does not plow in the autumn; he will seek at harvest and have nothing.

cnv.text: 懶惰人冬天不耕種； 到收割的時候，出去求食，必一無所得。

ccb.text: 懒惰人不按时耕种， 收获时必一无所得。

csbs.text: 懒惰的人不按季耕作， 却在收割时乞求收获，他必一无所得。
